metadata.title: Numbers - 일 – 십
metadata.source_description: Full-resolution Italki slide covering Sino-Korean and native Korean number systems.

item.notes: 수의 차례, 번호, 단위 Ex) telephone numbers, bus route numbers, height, weight, address number, years, months, minutes, seconds, and prices
